MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROCKWELL AUTOMATION, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: Matthew B. Lee, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLC, (415) 898-1555, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Timothy C. Connor, Esq. of Tucker Ellis & West LLP (415) 617-2209 appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied, failure to shift burden of proof. Defendant fails to show that defendant's products that plaintiff worked on did not contain asbestos. Defendant does not specifically reference the discovery responses that are factually devoid and only references them generally. Notice of motion and format of separate statement do not comply with CRC 3.1350(b) and 3.1350(h). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
